en: Now we can enjoy our breakfast. I doubt it.
ko: 축복이네요. 이제 아침을 즐길 수 있어요.

en: I was only allowed to make a cheese-free, mushroom-free, fat-free frittata.
ko: 의심스러워요. 치즈도, 버섯도, 지방도 없는 프리타타만 만들 수 있었어요.

en: Thanks to the girl in the plastic bubble. I think I'll order a pizza.
You know, I have half a mind to say something to Niles.
He is making a terrible mistake with that woman. But, Dad, it is Maris all over again.
ko: 그는 그 여자와 함께 끔찍한 실수를 하고 있어요.

en: She's dominating him, emasculating him. Look, I don't like her any more than you do,
ko: 그녀가 그를 지배하고, 남성성을 빼앗고 있어요.

en: and God knows we've been through this before. I didn't like Lilith, we both didn't like Maris,
ko: 릴리스를 좋아하지 않았고, 마리스를 둘 다 싫어했으며, 너희 남자들은 셰리를 정말 싫어했죠.

en: and you boys sure as hell didn't like Sherry. But what good did it do talking about it?
ko: 하지만 그에 대해 이야기해봤자 무슨 소용이 있었나요? 그는 끔찍한 패턴을 반복하고 있어요.

en: But he's repeating a terrible pattern. Well, he's going to repeat it whether you like it or not.
And if you say anything, he's just going to drive a wedge between you.
ko: 그리고 당신이 뭔가 말하면, 그 사이에 틈이 생길 거예요. 그래서 아무도 말하지 않을 거예요.

en: So nobody's going to say a word. Well, it's a shame Mel had to leave.
Oh, yeah. You know, we were having such a good time. Yes, Niles.
ko: 아, 맞아요. 정말 즐거운 시간을 보내고 있었어요.

en: Actually, I was nervous bringing her over here.
ko: 사실, 그녀를 여기 데려오는 게 긴장됐어요.

en: Well, I was concerned what you'd think, you know, getting to really know her the first time.
ko: 처음으로 그녀를 제대로 알게 될까 걱정했어요.

en: So? Oh, I'm going to go let Eddie in.
